task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'ci-services' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Artifactory Administration -> Identity and Access -> Groups section, the list should display a group named 'ci-services'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'svc-deploy' user, its email, non-admin status, and group membership.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Users section, 'svc-deploy' exists with the email 'svc-deploy@apex-healthcare.com'. The user details should show that 'Admin' privileges are NOT granted, and the user is a member of the 'ci-services' group.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the local npm repository named 'npm-builds'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Administration -> Repositories -> Local section, a repository named 'npm-builds' exists. Its Package Type should be 'npm' and the description should read 'CI/CD npm artifact store'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'svc-deploy-perms' permission target with correct repo and group access.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Permissions section, 'svc-deploy-perms' exists. The details should show it applies to the 'npm-builds' repository, and under the Groups tab, the 'ci-services' group is granted 'Read' and 'Deploy' (or 'Deploy/Cache') permissions.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of an access token for the 'svc-deploy' user with the correct description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Access Tokens section or user profile, there is a token generated for the user 'svc-deploy' with the description 'Service account token - Q1 2026 rotation', or a success modal showing the token creation with these details.

integrity.description: The agent used the Artifactory Web UI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Artifactory web interface in a browser (http://localhost:8082), rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The entities were actually created and saved in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success toast notifications (e.g., 'User created successfully') or the newly created entities appearing in their respective data tables/lists within the Artifactory UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots must not show the expected configuration written out in a text editor (like gedit, nano, or VS Code) as a substitute for actual application configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target User: 'svc-deploy' | Target Email: 'svc-deploy@apex-healthcare.com' | Target Group: 'ci-services' | Target Repo: 'npm-builds' (Type: local npm, Description: 'CI/CD npm artifact store') | Target Permission: 'svc-deploy-perms' (Grants 'ci-services' Read and Deploy access to 'npm-builds') | Target Token Description: 'Service account token - Q1 2026 rotation'.
